source_intake_record.raw_question_text: On the basis of what happens at the end of this chart, what is the most likely explanation for the population decline after point E?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: There was a major environmental shift that made survival impossible for many.

choice_map.B: There was a major environmental shift that made survival impossible for many.
choice_map.C: Food became scarce, leading to a major famine.
choice_map.D: The population had become too large.
